title: かごの扉はその手で開けろ

text_block_list.text:
As we head back, Narita Taishin and I take a
shortcut through the dessert section of the
station's underground mall, but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Geez, this place is packed. Some shortcut. It's
taking way longer to get through than if we just
went the normal way.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Come on, let's get out of here—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whoa!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Waaah!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm s-so sorry! Did I hurt you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Tch, no. Like that would hurt me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, thank goodness. I really am sorry!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um, then, I guess... I'll be going now...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wait.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Isn't that your phone on the ground?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? O-oh my gosh, you're right!

Rice Shower scrambles to pick her phone up, and
I catch a glance of the words "Apple Dessert Fair"
on the screen.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much! I'm sorry I'm such a bother...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whatever. It's no skin off—

text_block_list.name: Employee
text_block_list.text:
Get your apple cake here! This is the apple of the
Apple Dessert Fair's eye, and there are only ten
cakes left! Grab one while you can!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Forget it. Anyway, did you come here to buy
that? You just gonna leave empty-handed?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um, i-it's fine. I wanted to get a big apple cake to
split with everyone, but...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I bring nothing but misfortune, and I'll only
make a mess out of things! There's no way I can
invite the others to have cake...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hmm...

Without another word, Narita Taishin walks off by
herself. Shortly later, she returns with a box.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I got the last cake. I'm not one for sweets,
though, so here. You can have it.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: What?! Wh-why did you get it for me?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: No reason. Just felt like it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: There's this thing I can't stand...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
And that's when people want to do something,
but don't—because they think they can't.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Taishin...
choice_data_list:
Hey, let's head back and have some tea
together!

Hey, let's head back and invite lots of friends to
eat it with us!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Leave me out of your little tea party. I just said I
don't like sweets.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Actually! Um, the cake's description says it isn't
overly sweet!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Really?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yes. It's supposed to be tart, a little sweet, and
really delicious. If it's all right with you, Taishin,
um...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
M-maybe we can have it together! I'd really like
that...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Damn it.

We return to school with Rice Shower and enjoy
the tea and cake.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you do that, Rice. I'm gonna head back—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
U-um! Would you and your friends like some as
well?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Th-they have more apple desserts that I want to
try, so I'll go buy them and be right back!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Please wait for me here! I'll just be a second!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What? Hey, wait!
choice_data_list: Looks like we're having a dessert party!
Looks like we're having a dessert party!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What are you so happy about? How'd I get roped
into this?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Do I even have friends to invite? Ugh!

Luckily, she's able to get Winning Ticket to come,
and the tea party goes off without a hitch.
